name: Iso11783OPGetVersion
title: Iso11783OPGetVersion
syntax: long Iso11783OPGetVersion( dword ecuHandle, byte extendedVersions );
description: The function requests the stored object pools from the Virtual Terminal. A Get Version command or a Get Extended Version command is sent to the Virtual Terminal. If a response from the Virtual Terminal is received, the callback function Iso11783OPOnResponse is called.

parameters.name: ecuHandle
parameters.description: Handle of the ECU (must be created with Iso11783CreateECU)

parameters.name: extendedVersions
parameters.description: Kind of versions to query. To get extended versions a VT version 5 or higher is necessary. 0: get standard version strings (7 characters) 1: get extended version strings (32 characters)

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
